title: La moglie in vacanza... l'amante in città

sources.title: La Moglie In Vacanza L'amante In Citta 1980
sources.description: Is there a term for an Italian version of a French Bedroom Farce? Husbands and wives cheating on each other. Edwige Fenech and Barbara Bouchet are teamed with Renzo Montagnani and Lino Banfi yet again.  Italian with English subtitles

metadata.Plot: Andrea Damiani sends his wife Valeria off on a skiing holiday so he can spend time with his demanding mistress, Giulia. Little does he suspect that Valeria is having a rendezvous with a Count she recently met. However, Valeria does not know that 'Count' Giovanni is really just a manager's assistant, namely, Andrea's.
metadata.Writer: Francesco Milizia, Michele Massimo Tarantini, Ottavio Jemma
metadata.Actors: Edwige Fenech, Barbara Bouchet, Renzo Montagnani
